name: agyflow
description: Spec-driven development AI workflow for Google Antigravity

scripts.build: rm -rf scripts/safety-gate.js scripts/pre-invocation-reminder.js scripts/verify-template.js && bun build src/hooks/safety-gate.ts --outfile=scripts/safety-gate.js --target=node && bun build src/hooks/pre-invocation-reminder.ts --outfile=scripts/pre-invocation-reminder.js --target=node && bun build src/tools/verify_template.ts --outfile=scripts/verify-template.js --target=node
